_doc: Coverage thresholds enforced by tools/coverage/check-thresholds.ps1. Every public class must hit ≥90 % line AND ≥90 % branch under -Strict — no exemptions. Classes that are legitimately untestable (interfaces, generic abstract bases, sample / Blazor / Skia / Process.Start boundary code) are tagged with [ExcludeFromCodeCoverage] at the source so they disappear from the cobertura report entirely rather than being floor-exempted here. v1.9.0 cleanup (2026-04-23): thresholds.json carried 22 class-level exemptions; 14 were stale or obsolete, and the remaining 8 were migrated to [ExcludeFromCodeCoverage] attributes (see Playground.Pages.Playground, Playground.Layout.MainLayout, Program, IStreamingIndicator, ISeriesVisitor, PriceIndicator<TResult>, SkiaGlyphPathProvider, BrowserLauncher).
